description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large windows that allow for ample natural light and provide a view into the interior spaces. The house is accompanied by two stylized trees, one large and one small, positioned adjacent to the building, adding a natural element to the urban setting. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows visible on the longer facade. The main entryway is recessed, with a covered porch area and steps leading up to the door, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall structure is solid and geometric, with a focus on simplicity and open space.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist entryway, accompanied by two stylized trees.
description_view_0: Top-down angled view showing the flat roof, open interior layout, and both trees adjacent to the house.
description_view_1: Frontal perspective highlighting the main entryway, covered porch, and the larger tree to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade with large windows and the trees positioned behind the house.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the house and the dense foliage of the larger tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered porch, steps, and minimalist detailing
